name: Spicy Tuna Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions in oil until soft.
2. Add garlic and seasonings to the pan, stirring occasionally.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining 7 ingredients.
4. Combine the sauteed onions with the dry mixture.
5. Form the mixture into 8 patties.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. Fry the patties until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning to mix for optimal results.
